scripts.build: node ../../script/prepare-extension-sdk.mjs && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('./dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --entry-naming index.mjs --target=node --format=esm --packages=bundle && bun ../../script/validate-extension-bundle.ts --file ./dist/index.mjs --extension remote-exec
